author: Liu et al. (2022)
title: A ConvNet for the 2020s
why: ConvNet dimodernin biar nyaingin Transformer, gampang dicerna buat masuk frontier

author: Liu et al. (2021)
title: Swin Transformer: Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows
why: ViT dibikin hierarkis pakai shifted window, jadi backbone serba-guna

author: He et al. (2021)
title: Masked Autoencoders Are Scalable Vision Learners
why: Tutup 75% patch gambar terus rekonstruksi, self-supervised yang simpel tapi kuat

author: Bao et al. (2021)
title: BEiT: BERT Pre-Training of Image Transformers
why: Bawa gaya BERT ke gambar lewat masked image modeling pakai token visual

author: Caron et al. (2021)
title: Emerging Properties in Self-Supervised Vision Transformers
why: DINO: fitur self-supervised muncul sendiri, attention-nya bisa segmentasi objek

author: Oquab et al. (2023)
title: DINOv2: Learning Robust Visual Features without Supervision
why: Fitur visual serbaguna tanpa label, langsung kepakai banyak task tanpa finetune

author: Kirillov et al. (2023)
title: Segment Anything
why: SAM: model + dataset gede buat segmentasi apa aja lewat prompt, zero-shot

author: Arnab et al. (2021)
title: ViViT: A Video Vision Transformer
why: ViT dibawa ke video, tokenisasi spasial-temporal buat klasifikasi aksi

author: Tong et al. (2022)
title: VideoMAE: Masked Autoencoders are Data-Efficient Learners for Self-Supervised Video Pre-Training
why: MAE versi video, tube-masking 90%+ tapi tetap hemat data dan jago

author: Li et al. (2022)
title: BLIP: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training for Unified Vision-Language Understanding and Generation
why: Satu model paham + generate caption, bootstrap caption noisy dari web

author: Li et al. (2023)
title: BLIP-2: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training with Frozen Image Encoders and Large Language Models
why: Jembatani encoder gambar beku ke LLM beku pakai Q-Former, murah tapi kuat

author: Liu et al. (2023)
title: Visual Instruction Tuning
why: LLaVA: instruction-tuning multimodal, resep asisten yang bisa lihat gambar

author: Alayrac et al. (2022)
title: Flamingo: a Visual Language Model for Few-Shot Learning
why: VLM few-shot yang selang-seling gambar-teks, gated cross-attn ke LM beku

author: Ho et al. (2020)
title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
why: DDPM: fondasi diffusion, belajar denoise bertahap dari noise ke gambar

author: Song et al. (2020)
title: Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models
why: DDIM: sampling diffusion non-Markov, jauh lebih cepat tanpa latih ulang

author: Ho & Salimans (2022)
title: Classifier-Free Diffusion Guidance
why: Guidance tanpa classifier, trik wajib biar text-to-image nurut prompt

author: Dhariwal & Nichol (2021)
title: Diffusion Models Beat GANs on Image Synthesis
why: ADM: diffusion ngalahin GAN pakai classifier guidance, titik balik generatif

author: Nichol et al. (2021)
title: GLIDE: Towards Photorealistic Image Generation and Editing with Text-Guided Diffusion Models
why: Text-to-image diffusion + editing, cikal bakal generasi gambar dari teks

author: Rombach et al. (2022)
title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
why: Stable Diffusion: diffusion di ruang laten, hemat komputasi tapi resolusi tinggi

author: Peebles & Xie (2022)
title: Scalable Diffusion Models with Transformers
why: DiT: ganti U-Net jadi Transformer, diffusion yang scaling-nya mulus

author: Saharia et al. (2022)
title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
why: Imagen: teks-encoder gede + cascade diffusion, hasil foto-realistis

author: Ramesh et al. (2022)
title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
why: DALL-E 2 / unCLIP: generate gambar lewat prior+decoder di laten CLIP

author: Zhang et al. (2023)
title: Adding Conditional Control to Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
why: ControlNet: kontrol spasial (pose, edge, depth) ke diffusion tanpa rusak model

author: Song et al. (2020)
title: Score-Based Generative Modeling through Stochastic Differential Equations
why: Kerangka SDE nyatuin score-matching + diffusion, teori paling nginti

author: Mildenhall et al. (2020)
title: NeRF: Representing Scenes as Neural Radiance Fields for View Synthesis
why: NeRF: scene 3D jadi MLP, sintesis view baru fotorealistis dari beberapa foto

author: Müller et al. (2022)
title: Instant Neural Graphics Primitives with a Multiresolution Hash Encoding
why: Instant-NGP: hash encoding multiresolusi, latih NeRF dari jam ke detik

author: Kerbl et al. (2023)
title: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering
why: 3DGS: scene jadi jutaan Gaussian, render radiance field real-time kualitas top
